about.bio: A data professional with 7+ years of experience across banking and enterprise sectors, specializing in AI Engineering, Machine Learning, and Data Engineering after completing Hacktiv8's bootcamp program. Experienced in building end-to-end systems — from tax automation serving 15,000+ employees to investor risk classification models for regulatory compliance.
